summary: Sales Performance & Assignment Pack (Phase 1) testing complete. All 15 features tested. Backend: 18/18 tests passed. Frontend: All UI components verified including SalesPerformancePage, PerformanceCell, PerformanceBreakdownDrawer, stat cards, and table filtering.
test_credentials: Admin: admin@konekt.co.tz / KnktcKk_L-hw1wSyquvd!, Sales: neema.sales@konekt.demo / Sales123!
seed_data_creation: None - used existing sales team (janeth, brian, neema)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Sales Performance Pack Phase 1 complete. All 3 sales users show 22% score (developing zone) because they have no CRM lead data yet. The /me endpoint correctly strips 'tip' field from breakdown for role safety. Assignment engine uses ownership continuity gate first, then scored assignment. Capabilities CRUD working with lanes, categories, max_active_leads, active flag.

1_team_performance_admin_only.details: Returns team list with user_id, name, email, performance_score, performance_zone, sample_size, status. Admin only (403 for sales).

2_sales_detail_full_breakdown.details: Returns full breakdown with 5 metrics, tips, and capabilities. Admin only.

3_my_performance_role_safe.details: Returns own performance. ROLE-SAFE: No 'tip' field in breakdown entries.

4_get_capabilities.details: Returns lanes, categories, max_active_leads, active flag. Admin only.

5_update_capabilities.details: Updates lanes, categories, workload limits. Verified with GET after PUT.

6_assignment_scored.details: Returns scored_assignment routing with candidate list when no existing owner.

7_assignment_continuity_gate.details: Returns continuity routing when existing owner found (checks client_ownership and crm_leads).

8_performance_zones.details: Zones correctly assigned: developing (<5 samples), excellent (>=85), safe (>=70), risk (<70).

9_sales_performance_page_ui.details: Page loads with heading, stat cards row, search bar, and performance table.

10_stat_cards_row.details: 5 stat cards: Total (3), Excellent (0), Safe (0), Risk (0), Developing (3).

11_performance_table.details: Columns: Name, Email, Performance, Zone, Data Points, Status. Shows 3 sales members.

12_performance_cell_click.details: Clickable button with zone-colored background. Opens PerformanceBreakdownDrawer on click.

13_breakdown_drawer.details: Shows score header (22% DEVELOPING), 5 breakdown bars with weights, improvement tips section.

14_stat_card_filtering.details: Clicking stat cards filters table by zone. Total shows all, Developing shows 3.

15_search_bar_filtering.details: Search bar filters table by name/email.

16_regression_admin_pages.details: All existing admin pages load correctly without regression.

performance_data_note: All 3 sales users (janeth, brian, neema) show 22% score in 'developing' zone because they have no CRM lead data yet. Customer Rating defaults to 75% when no ratings exist. Other metrics (Conversion Rate, Revenue Contribution, Response Speed, Follow-up Compliance) are 0% due to no lead activity.
